name: Tomato, Basiel & Orzo Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sherry or apple juice (I used apple juice)
4 cups fresh or canned plum tomatoes, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until soft.
3. Stir in garlic and bell pepper; cook for 1-2 minutes more.
4. Add tomatoes and vegetable broth; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, simmer for 7 minutes.
6. Stir in orzo and simmer an additional 10 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in basil just before serving.
Makes: 4 servings
